info.description: Rotatable 3D preview for a piece of gear (e.g. photogrammetry-scanned speaker.glb), matching TOPICS[].model in studio-vr's courseData.js.

kind.description: Procedural-placeholder fallback identifier used by studio-vr's GearModelViewer when no scan file is present (e.g. "speaker").

file.description: .glb/.gltf scan, uploaded via the S3 provider.
